mapper.select: select c1.cID, c1.pID, c1.uID as CommenterID, c1.cDate, c1.cContent, cl1.cLikes, c1.rReplyID, u1.uNickName as Commenter, u2.uNickName as Recipient from CommentOnProductTable c1 inner join CommentLikesTable cl1 on cl1.cID=c1.cID inner join UserAccountTable u1 on c1.uID=u1.uID left join CommentOnProductTable c2 on c1.rReplyID=c2.cID left join UserAccounttable u2 on c2.uID=u2.uID where c1.pID=#{pID};
